notes: Every service is individually priced and maps to one or more audit categories. Bundle discounts reward buying more without forcing packages. Each service is the smallest sellable unit. Client-facing language NEVER mentions GHL — always say Snap Flow Solutions platform.

map_pack_combo.rule: When 3+ services from google_presence + reviews_reputation are recommended together, present as Local Map Pack solution

services.name: Google Business Profile Optimization
services.description: Full GBP setup — categories, photos, services, posts, and Q&A management

services.name: GBP Weekly Posts
services.description: Weekly Google Business Profile posts — offers, updates, photos to keep listing active

services.name: Citation Cleanup & NAP Consistency
services.description: Fix business name, address, phone across 40+ directories — Yelp, Bing, Apple Maps, etc.

services.name: Citation Monitoring & Maintenance
services.description: Ongoing monitoring of directory listings — catch and fix changes, new submissions monthly

services.name: Manual Citation Submission
services.description: Individual directory listing submission or correction — à la carte, you pick the directories

services.name: City/Service Area Landing Page
services.description: Dedicated SEO-optimized page targeting a specific city or service area

services.name: AI Search Visibility (AEO/GEO)
services.description: Optimize for AI search engines — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews

services.name: Landing Page Design
services.description: Custom conversion-focused landing page with lead capture form and CTA

services.name: Website Optimization
services.description: Fix CTA placement, mobile responsiveness, speed, contact info above the fold

services.name: Website Chat Widget
services.description: AI-powered chat widget on their website for instant lead capture

services.name: Missed Call Text-Back
services.description: Automatic text sent instantly when a call goes unanswered — captures the lead before they call a competitor

services.name: Voice AI Receptionist
services.description: AI answers calls 24/7, collects caller info, qualifies leads, books appointments

services.name: SMS AI Assistant
services.description: Conversational AI that handles inbound and outbound text messages — answers questions, qualifies leads

services.name: Unified Inbox Setup
services.description: All channels — phone, text, email, DM, form — routed to one dashboard so nothing gets lost

services.name: Speed-to-Lead Automation
services.description: Instant automated response within 60 seconds of any form fill, missed call, or new lead

services.name: Email Nurture Sequences
services.description: Automated email drip sequences for new leads — keeps your business top of mind until they're ready

services.name: SMS Nurture Sequences
services.description: Automated text message follow-up sequences for leads who don't convert immediately

services.name: Online Booking / Scheduling
services.description: Online calendar with automated confirmations, reminders, and no-show follow-up

services.name: Automated Review Requests
services.description: Automated SMS/email review requests sent after completed jobs — builds Google reviews on autopilot

services.name: Review Response Management
services.description: Professional responses to every Google review — positive and negative — within 24 hours

services.name: Reputation Monitoring & Alerts
services.description: Track new reviews across Google, Yelp, Facebook — instant alerts when reviews are posted

services.name: Social Media Posting
services.description: Consistent posting schedule across Facebook and Instagram — 3-4 posts per week

services.name: Social Profile Setup & Optimization
services.description: Set up or optimize Facebook business page and Instagram profile — bios, photos, links, CTA buttons

services.name: Short-Form Video Content
services.description: Professional editing of short-form video — reels, TikTok, Shorts. Per-video pricing with monthly packages available.

services.name: Past Customer Reactivation Campaign
services.description: Automated outreach to past customers — 'We haven't seen you in a while' sequences via SMS and email

services.name: Seasonal Promotion Campaigns

services.name: Referral Program Setup

services.name: CRM Setup & Pipeline Build

services.name: Appointment Reminder Automation
